title: Standard Library Problem Solving · Behavior Case: Python Random Secrets
summary: Add time, statistics, secure identifiers, text search, process, and logging features to the data tool. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python random secrets increment in a standard-library operations toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use random for simulation and secrets for security-sensitive tokens while controlling reproducibility where appropriate.
Use math and statistics functions with explicit domain, empty-input, precision, and outlier assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
